results.rendered_html:
2. putrīya Nom. P. ˚yati, to wish for a son or children,  RV. vii, 96, 4  (pr. p. ˚yat);
to treat like a son,  Pāṇ. iii, 1, 10 , Sch. (Desid. puputrīyiṣati, putitrīyiṣati or putrīyiyiṣati,  Pāṇ. vi, 1, 3 , Vārtt. 4,  Pat. ; puputitrīyiyiṣiṣati,  Vop. )

results.rendered_html:
putrīya (von putra) adj. f. ā zu einem Sohn in Beziehung stehend, einen [Page4-0767] Sohn verschaffend  P. 5,1,40 . vidhāna  SUŚR. 1,316,15 . iṣṭi  R. GORR. 1,14,1  (2  SCHL. ). 36,1 .  RAGH. 10,4 .  KATHĀS. 13,58 . pāyasa  R. GORR. 1,15,9 . 20 . dhanyaṃ yaśasyaṃ putrīyamāyuṣyaṃ vijayāvaham  MBH. 1,2797 . 13,4223 .
— Vgl. putriya, putrya.
